steps.title: Locate the underlined sentence
steps.content: The passage describes how the team traced oak planks to the Jura region of France. The underlined sentence then reasons: because timber from distant Jura had to come by boat, the findings "suggest the complexity of Roman trade routes."

steps.title: Name the function
steps.content: That move — taking the team's evidence and drawing a broader inference about Roman trade — is presenting a conclusion based on the findings.

steps.title: Per-choice elimination
steps.content:
• Choice A — It presents a conclusion about Roman trade routes based on the team's findings.: exactly what the sentence does. ✓
  • Choice B — It questions how the team was able to conclude that the planks were used to build a boat.: the sentence says timber was transported by boat, not that the planks were used to build one. Misread. ✗
  • Choice C — It explains why the planks were made from oak rather than a different kind of wood.: the sentence says nothing about oak vs. other woods. Off topic. ✗
  • Choice D — It describes common methods used in Roman subway construction.: subway construction is only the modern setting where planks were found; the sentence is about Roman trade. Misread. ✗
A is correct.
